title: Commission members; compensation prohibited; expenses
doc_html:
§34.  Commission members; compensation prohibited; expenses

No member of the commission shall receive any compensation for his services, but shall be paid his expenses necessarily incurred in the performance of his duties as a member of the commission.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 152, §1.
doc_text:
§34.  Commission members; compensation prohibited; expenses
No member of the commission shall receive any compensation for his services, but shall be paid his expenses necessarily incurred in the performance of his duties as a member of the commission.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 152, §1.
